title.rendered: Announcing a New Partnership with InstaSecure

content.rendered:
At Prowler, we’ve always believed that visibility is just the beginning. Seeing your cloud risks—clearly, quickly, and comprehensively—is foundational. But in today’s complex environments, it’s not enough.

Security teams don’t just need more alerts. They need actionable insight. They need prioritization. They need things to get fixed.

That’s why I’m excited to share that we’re partnering with InstaSecure, a team that deeply understands this next step. Together, we’re connecting detection with remediation—so security no longer stops at the “insight” phase. It becomes a closed loop.

From Insight to Impact

Prowler is known for surfacing the truth about your cloud environment—whether it’s AWS, Azure, GCP, or Kubernetes. With over 10 million downloads and contributions from thousands of engineers, we’ve helped teams move from uncertainty to clarity.

InstaSecure brings that same level of focus—but for action. Their platform takes alerts (from CSPM tools like Prowler and beyond), organizes them against your cloud guardrails, and remediates what matters, fast. 

Why This Matters

Security fatigue is real. When you’re staring down thousands of alerts, the biggest risk isn’t what you miss—it’s what you ignore. This partnership is about changing that equation:

  • Real-time visibility with Prowler
  • Intelligent alert triage with InstaSecure
  • Rapid remediation at scale, tied to compliance and context

No more swivel-chair security. No more disjointed workflows. Just a better, more effective path from “something’s off” to “it’s fixed.”

What’s Next

This is just the start. We’re already working with joint customers to integrate Prowler’s checks with InstaSecure’s remediation engine—and the feedback has been clear: this is what modern cloud security should feel like.

We’re not trying to replace humans. We’re trying to free them up to do what they do best: solve hard problems, architect secure systems, and stay ahead of what’s next.

If you’re a builder, a defender, or just someone who’s tired of seeing the same alert for the fiftieth time—this partnership is for you.

Let’s go from finding problems to fixing them. Together.
